# License — patterns-dither-retro

## Upstream

- No upstream asset was copied. All 30 SVG files in this folder were authored locally.
- Patterns are based on generic public-domain dither / halftone / Bayer-matrix algorithms (Bayer 1973; halftone predates modern copyright).

## Acquisition note

No scraping. No copying. Authored from mathematical primitives and direct pixel placement.

## Licensing intent

CC0 — public-domain dedication. No restrictions.

## Use in Clawmachine

No restrictions. Ship freely under whatever license Clawmachine adopts.
